data.title: Tesla stock's recent sideways movement may signal a potential breakout. Traders advised to use technical analysis for guidance.
data.description: Tesla's recent behavior may indicate an imminent surge in value. Utilize technical analysis for effective trading strategies. The significance of Tesla Stock's stagnant movement is elaborated in an article by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Ouster stock has surged as customers implement its lidar sensors for physical AI; CEO highlights expanding reach.
data.description: The value of Ouster stock has significantly increased this year as more customers are transitioning from trials to actively using its lidar sensors for physical AI purposes. The company's CEO highlights the expanding utilization of lidar technology.

data.title: Software stocks show contrast in Q2 earnings: JFrog up, Twilio down. Investors reward JFrog, punish Twilio.
data.description: During the second quarter earnings report, investors displayed contrasting reactions towards software companies JFrog and Twilio. JFrog experienced a significant surge in its stock value, whereas Twilio faced a notable decline. This reaction indicates that JFrog's financial performance was well-received by the market, while Twilio's results were met with disapproval. The specific numbers regarding the stock movements were not provided, but it is evident that investors favor the performance of JFrog over Twilio in this period.

data.title: US EV sales significantly declined in 2022 due to Trump's budget cutting incentives. China maintains strong support for EVs.
data.description: Electric vehicle sales in the United States have experienced a noticeable decline since the beginning of 2022. This downturn has raised questions about the impact of the budget cuts on incentives made during the Trump administration. While the future of EV sales in the U.S. seems uncertain, China continues to heavily invest in this promising sector. The differing approaches of these two global powers highlight the crucial juncture that the American electric vehicle market currently stands at.

data.title: Instacart stock surges after Maplebear's Q2 report, with 11% sales growth for the app. Expanding beyond groceries.
data.description: Following Maplebear's second-quarter earnings report, Instacart's stock experienced a significant increase. The report revealed an impressive 11% growth in sales for the popular grocery-delivery app. This positive news suggests that Instacart is expanding its services beyond just groceries, leading to a surge in investor interest and boosting the company's stock value.

data.title: 25K+ enroll in UMD Smith AI course for career growth - free online certification on AI.
data.description: In College Park, Maryland, a free online certificate course on artificial intelligence for career advancement from the University of Maryland's Robert H. Smith School of Business has attracted over 25,000 participants globally. The course, "Artificial Intelligence and Career Development," offers valuable insights and training in this futuristic technology.

data.title: William F. Buckley Jr. will be honored with a stamp by the US Postal Service at Yale University.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, the U.S. Postal Service announced the dedication of a new stamp at Yale University to honor William F. Buckley Jr. Buckley was known for his significant contributions to American conservatism as a writer, political commentator, and novelist. The stamp commemorates his legacy and impact on modern American political thought. This initiative is part of a series of recognitions by the Postal Service for influential figures in American history.

data.title: Jeremy Zahn aids Native American tribes as federal programs dwindle, securing grants for their future.
data.description: Jeremy Zahn, a grant writer for Native American tribes, is assisting tribal communities as they face the disappearance of federal programs. In the United States, numerous tribal communities are at risk of collapse without essential grants. Zahn's efforts are crucial in securing a future for these communities. This support is especially vital as federal programs dwindle, putting at risk the survival of many tribal groups. Zahn's work highlights the critical role that grants play in sustaining Native American communities, with the future of these tribes heavily relying on securing necessary funding.

data.title: Iamgold Corp (NYSE: IAG) reports Q2 earnings call transcript, achieving production of 173,000oz, aiming for 735-820,000oz production with cost guidance at $1,830-$1,930/oz. Cash and cash equivalents stand at $223.8M, with net debt at $1B and liquidity at $616.5M. Industry focuses on maximizing throughput and operational efficiency.
data.description: Iamgold Corp (NYSE: IAG) reported its second-quarter financial results, with revenue from continuing operations totaling $580.9 million from sales of 182,000 ounces at an average realized price of $3,182 per ounce. The company produced 173,000 ounces of gold in the quarter and had quarterly cash costs of $1,556 per ounce and all-in sustaining costs of $2,041 per ounce. They aim to achieve a production target of 735-820,000 ounces of gold at a cost range of $1,830-$1,930 per ounce for the year. Iamgold had 223.8 million in cash and cash equivalents and net debt of 1 billion at the end of the quarter. The company has made progress in ramping up the Cote Gold mine and plans to announce an updated Cote mine life of mine next year. They also highlighted their focus on responsible mining practices and safety along with their efforts to delever the balance sheet and prioritize debt repayment.

data.title: US dollar money supply grew 3.87% in Q2 2025, while the Dollar Index dropped 7.03%. Global M2 increased due to dollar depreciation. Domestic M2 hit record $22 trillion, with a 4.5% YoY growth. Fed hasn't cut rates despite this significant growth.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, the U.S. dollar-denominated money supply increased by 3.87%, reaching a record $22 trillion. The U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) experienced a significant decline of 7.03%, one of the steepest quarterly drops in recent history. This decline had a notable impact on global M2 measurements when calculated in dollars, causing a substantial increase even with modest growth in local currency M2. However, when assessed at constant exchange rates, global M2 only showed a modest rise of 1.19%. Despite the Federal Reserve maintaining interest rates and reducing its balance sheet, the M2 money supply's year-over-year growth of 4.5% surpassed the previous peak of $21.86 trillion reached in March 2022. This growth, although slightly below the long-term average, signifies a significant increase amidst the ongoing monetary policy landscape.
